name: Jared Golden
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,449,465 for Jared Golden in U.S. House, ME-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
